items.title: lots of folks prepping talks next week (congrats!).
items.title_zh: 很多人正在准备下周的演讲（恭喜！）。
items.description: lots of folks prepping talks next week (congrats!). Some thoughts from RLing on thousands of hours of engineer- and researcher- focused talks: - AI generated svgs > AI generated imgs. MAXIMUM 4 ai slop images in your slides, I don't care h…
items.description_zh: 很多人正在准备下周的演讲（恭喜！）。 RLing 对数千小时的工程师和研究人员重点演讲的一些想法： - AI 生成的 svgs > AI 生成的 imgs。你的幻灯片中最多有 4 张 ai 倾斜图像，我不在乎……

items.title: LOTS of alpha in this pod:
items.title_zh: 这个 Pod 中有很多 alpha：
items.description: LOTS of alpha in this pod: - Why Databricks beat Snowflake (! a straight answer!) - Why everyone is building a metaharness now - Why the @neondatabase made so much sense (so much @nikitabase glazing its not even funny) - How LTAP solves th…
items.description_zh: 这个 Pod 中有很多 alpha 内容： - 为什么 Databricks 击败了 Snowflake（！直接回答！） - 为什么现在每个人都在构建 Metaharness - 为什么 @neondatabase 如此有意义（如此多的 @nikitabase glazing 甚至一点都不好笑） - LTAP 如何解决这个问题……

items.title: Claude Design is pretty great.
items.description: Claude Design is pretty great. I gave it a repo for a mobile app I'm building and it reproduced the screens perfectly. Except after one prompt it's telling me to save tokens already 😅 https://t.co/k6hQ53zmFN
items.description_zh: 克劳德的设计非常棒。我为我正在构建的移动应用程序提供了一个存储库，它完美地再现了屏幕。除了一个提示后，它告诉我已经保存令牌了😅 https://t.co/k6hQ53zmFN

items.title: AI will bring forth an unprecedented surge in entrepreneurship.

items.description: AI will bring forth an unprecedented surge in entrepreneurship. From 'solopreneurs,' to the revitalization of the small & medium business segment, to the emergence of the largest companies of our times… providing the foundation of it a…
